Appearances: Laura S. Flynn of Low Ball & Lynch (981.6630) for defendant and responding party; Andrew Dimitriou of Dimitriou & Associates (434.1144) for plaintiff and moving party.

Argued and the court modified its ruling as follows: granted in part. Defendant shall provide further responses to the requests for admissions and form interrogatory 17.1 no later than December 9, 2011. Defendant's service of supplemental responses to the requests for production moots that part of the motion. Documents are to be provided to plaintiff by November 30, 2011 if they are in defendant Harney's custody and control. Sanctions are denied. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn, not reported.
